query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A young child in a light-colored coat and skirt walks across a paved plaza scattered with pigeons, while adults pass by in the background near a building wall.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred black-and-white photograph of a young child in a light-colored coat and skirt walking across a paved plaza with pigeons, the scene suffused with soft oppressive gray tones and heavy directional blur that streaks the child, birds, and passing adults into ghostly impressions, with crushed shadows swallowing the right side of the frame.
